concepts.notes: Phrase block: core help-request expression for A1 learners.
Question (not application/request form).
Formal request/application in administrative contexts.
Inquiry/request for information.
Formal petition/instance (often administrative, especially CH usage).

Editorial addition from the ora/Uhr ambiguity audit. English is intentionally modeled as a broad timekeeping-device concept that accepts both clock and watch, because German Uhr and Italian orologio do not split that distinction here.
Editorial addition from the ora/Uhr ambiguity audit. Phrase block for asking the time of day.
Editorial addition from the ora/Uhr ambiguity audit. This is clock time or time of day, distinct from Stunde = hour and Uhr = device. CEFR confirmed editorially as A1 on 2026-03-21.
Editorial addition aligned with the existing A2 compare family. CEFR confirmed in dedicated review on 2026-03-21.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad 'sensitive / easily affected' sense for people, skin, devices, materials, or topics; not split into a separate emotional-only concept. CEFR set editorially to B1 on 2026-03-21.

Editorial addition from English lemma expansion. Modeled around the general idea of distance between places or points. German uses Entfernung as the neutral concrete term; Distanz is also accepted here as a common cognate and broader or slightly more formal alternative. Kept separate from the race-specific sense already covered elsewhere.

Editorial addition from the Italian pulire/lavare ambiguity audit. Modeled around washing with water and often soap. Kept separate from putzen = everyday cleaning of rooms or surfaces and reinigen = more formal or technical cleaning.

Editorial addition from the Italian pulire/lavare ambiguity audit. Modeled around everyday cleaning of rooms, surfaces, objects, windows, or shoes. Kept separate from waschen = wash with water and reinigen = more formal or technical cleaning.

Editorial addition from the Italian pulire/lavare ambiguity audit. Modeled around more formal or technical cleaning that removes dirt, residue, or other substances thoroughly. Kept separate from putzen = everyday household cleaning and waschen = washing with water.

Editorial addition completing the waschen/putzen/reinigen cluster. Modeled around rinsing with water, especially dishes, glasses, or other objects. Kept separate from waschen = wash the body or clothes, putzen = everyday cleaning, and reinigen = more formal or technical cleaning. The toilet-flush sense is intentionally excluded.

Editorial addition from German surface expansion. Normalized from the surface form 'spitze' to the adjective lemma 'spitz'. Modeled only for the physical pointed or tapered sense. Kept separate from the noun 'Spitze', from colloquial 'spitze!' = great, and from the figurative biting-remark sense.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled for the physical tip, point, or topmost end of an object or structure. Kept separate from colloquial spitze = great, from Spitze = lace, and from abstract leadership or top-position uses.

Editorial addition from the plural request `Leistungen`, normalized to the noun lemma `Leistung`. This concept covers the performance/achievement sense only; the administrative/services/benefits sense remains intentionally separate to avoid semantic overlap.

Editorial split for the remaining Spitze family. This branch models Spitze only in the textile sense of lace. It stays separate from the physical tip sense, from top-position uses, and from colloquial spitze = great.

Editorial split for the remaining Spitze family. This branch models Spitze as the leading or highest position in a ranking or structure. It stays separate from the physical tip sense, from lace, and from the colloquial evaluative use.

Editorial split for the remaining Spitze family. This branch models spitz only in the figurative sense of biting, pointed, or hurtful remarks and tone. It stays separate from the physical pointed-shape sense.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vereinbarung. This branch models the verb vereinbaren only in the sense of agreeing on or settling a concrete point, date, or condition together.

Advanced family expansion around agreement and obligation language. This branch models verbindlich only in the binding, official, or obligatory sense, not the interpersonal sense of polite or obliging behavior.
Advanced family expansion around agreement and negotiation language. This branch models Verhandlung only in the sense of negotiation or talks, not the courtroom-trial sense.
Advanced family expansion around negotiation language. This branch models verhandeln only in the negotiation sense of discussing terms or conditions, not the courtroom sense of trying a case.
Advanced family expansion around negotiation language. This branch models aushandeln as negotiating specific terms until a concrete result is fixed. It stays separate from generic verhandeln.

Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models leisten only in the sense of accomplishing, carrying out, or producing significant output. The afford sense in sich etwas leisten and other branches stay separate.

Advanced family expansion around output and formal results language. This branch models erbringen in the formal sense of providing or producing a result, proof, service, or contribution. It stays separate from verbringen = spend time somewhere.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models leistungsfähig in the sense of being able to perform strongly, effectively, or reliably under demand.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-leistung. This branch models Leistungsfähigkeit as the capacity to perform well, especially under requirements or strain.
Advanced evaluation branch connected to the performance and achievement family. This branch models überragend as clearly superior, exceptional, or well above an already strong standard.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-voraussetzung. This branch models voraussetzen only in the precondition or requirement sense, not in the sense of assuming or taking something for granted.
Advanced family expansion around prerequisite and consequence language. This branch models bedingen in the formal sense of entailing or making another development necessary.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models zusammenhängen in the abstract sense of being connected or related.

Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vorgehen and concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models nachvollziehen only in the abstract sense of following or understanding reasoning, motives, or logic, not in the sense of physically tracing something.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-vorgehen and concept-b1-zusammenhang. This branch models nachvollziehbar as understandable in terms of reasoning, explanation, or motivation.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-herausforderung. This branch models herausfordern in the sense of demanding a strong response, effort, or ability from a person, team, or system.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-herausforderung. This branch models herausfordernd in the sense of being demanding, difficult, and requiring real effort.
Advanced communication expansion. This branch models Missverständnis as a misunderstanding caused by different interpretations, incomplete information, or unclear wording.
Advanced communication expansion. This branch models missverstehen in the sense of understanding a message, intention, or situation incorrectly.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-eindruck. This branch models beeindrucken in the sense of making a strong positive impression through quality, ability, presence, or result.
Advanced communication expansion around explanation and misunderstanding. This branch models klarstellen in the sense of making something clear, explicit, or no longer open to confusion.
Advanced communication expansion around clarity. This branch models eindeutig in the sense of being clear, unambiguous, and not open to different interpretations.
Advanced communication expansion around misunderstanding. This branch models missverständlich in the sense of being phrased or presented in a way that can easily be misunderstood.
Advanced evaluation expansion around concept-b1-bewerten. This branch models einschätzen in the sense of judging or estimating something based on experience, information, or observation.
Advanced evaluation expansion around concept-b1-bewerten and concept-b2-einschaetzen. This branch models Einschätzung as an assessment or considered judgment.
Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-ueberzeugen. This branch models überzeugend in the sense of being persuasive because the reasoning, evidence, or presentation is strong.

Advanced family expansion around concept-b1-verantwortung and concept-b1-verantwortlich. This branch models verantwortungsvoll in the sense of acting with care, seriousness, and awareness of consequences.

Advanced reliability expansion connected to high-performance and responsible-behavior language. This branch models zuverlässig in the sense of being dependable and consistently working or acting as expected.

Advanced reasoning expansion around Zusammenhang and assessment language. This branch models einordnen in the sense of placing information, events, or statements into a broader context or category so that they can be understood properly.
Advanced reasoning expansion around Zusammenhang and context-setting language. This branch models Einordnung as the act or result of contextualizing or classifying something meaningfully.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad unsettling or creepy sense for places, stories, sounds, or situations; not split into a separate gore-only or stronger terrifying branch. CEFR set editorially to B1 on 2026-04-17.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the gap or safe space between people or things, not the general route-length sense already covered by Entfernung. CEFR placed editorially at A2 on 2026-04-17.
Editorial addition aligned with the existing compare family. Modeled as the noun difference sense and kept separate from the adjective unterschiedlich. CEFR placed editorially at A2 on 2026-04-17.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad strong, stable, and not easily damaged sense for people, materials, devices, or systems; not the military sense and not the food or flavor sense. CEFR set editorially to B2 on 2026-04-17.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the able-to-withstand-pressure sense for people, teams, systems, or materials. The data or evidence sense of belastbar remains intentionally excluded here to avoid overlap with reliable or verifiable language such as zuverlässig. CEFR set editorially to B2 on 2026-04-17.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad vulnerable sense for people, positions, or systems that can be hurt, attacked, or damaged easily. CEFR set editorially to B2 on 2026-04-17.
ED-05: level raised to B1 on 2026-05-25. The discourse-level broadening use ('Überhaupt trinke ich wenig Kaffee.') is not a beginner pattern. See DL-012.

lexemes.notes: covers the 'for the rest / otherwise' sense of ansonsten; the primary Italian equivalent for 'otherwise' is 'altrimenti'
approved plural batch 3; 'formale' is redundant since Antrag is inherently formal - review whether 'la domanda' or 'l'istanza' is a better primary
approved plural batch 3; periphrastic rendering - no single Italian word maps exactly to Anfrage
plural blocked: semantic mismatch with Länder
accepted synonym of adesso; keep distinct from noun ora=hour
Translates German kennen: familiarity with a person or place, as opposed to wissen (to know a fact).
Equivalent of German kennen: to know a person or place through familiarity, not factual knowledge (sapere).
keinesfalls is formal/written; assolutamente no is more emphatic/spoken - closer formal equivalents: 'in nessun caso', 'per nessun motivo'
approved support variant for Stunde/hour; duplicate_surface_v2
adds connotation of difficulty/effort not present in aushandeln - 'to negotiate' or 'to work out' are closer; 'to hammer out' is idiomatic and informal
captures the contextualization sense of einordnen but misses the classification/ranking sense ('to categorize', 'to assess', 'to place')
bare form of lexeme-en-c1-put-in-context; same meaning_status applies
reviewed scoped support variant for kennen
reviewed scoped support variant for kennen
reviewed support variant for state posture sense
Used in Italian to convey the emphatic or exasperated tone of German überhaupt in questions (e.g. 'Ma poi cosa vuoi?'). Italian does not have a direct single-particle equivalent for this function.
Translates the emphatic particle function of German überhaupt in rhetorical or frustrated questions (e.g. 'What are you even doing here?').
Shared with mindestens (A2) - covers the concessive sense but also quantitative; approximate for zumindest grading.
More emphatic/concessive variant; mirrors perlomeno register.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas gründlich oder fachlich von Schmutz, Rückständen oder anderen Stoffen befreien.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Formeller und technischer als putzen; häufig bei Filtern, Geräten, Oberflächen oder Materialien.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Liberare qualcosa in modo accurato o più tecnico da sporco, residui o altre sostanze.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Più formale o tecnico del normale pulire di casa; utile per filtri, dispositivi, superfici o materiali.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To remove dirt, residue, or other substances from something in a thorough or more technical way.
concept_definitions.usage_note: More formal or technical than the everyday household sense; useful for filters, devices, surfaces, or materials.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit Wasser Essensreste, Seife oder andere Rückstände von Geschirr, Gläsern oder anderen Dingen entfernen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Oft bei Tellern, Tassen, Gläsern oder Haaren; hier nicht im Sinn von eine Toilette spülen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Togliere con l'acqua residui di cibo, sapone o altre sostanze da piatti, bicchieri o altri oggetti.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Spesso per stoviglie, bicchieri o capelli; qui non nel senso di tirare l'acqua del water.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To remove food, soap, or other residue with water from dishes, glasses, or other objects.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Often used for dishes, glasses, or hair; not used here in the sense of flushing a toilet.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit einem schmalen, zulaufenden Ende oder einer Form, die sich zum Ende hin verengt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die körperliche Form eines Gegenstands; nicht die umgangssprachliche Bewertung spitze! = großartig und nicht die übertragene Bedeutung für verletzende Bemerkungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Che termina con una punta stretta o con una forma che si assottiglia verso la fine.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il senso fisico della forma; non il valore figurato di osservazione pungente.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Having a narrow end or a shape that becomes thinner toward the end.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the physical shape sense is modeled here, not the figurative sense for biting remarks.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Der äußerste, schmale oder oberste Endpunkt eines Gegenstands oder Bauwerks.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die körperliche Spitze oder der oberste Abschluss; getrennt von Führung oder Topposition und von Spitze als Stoff.

concept_definitions.short_definition: La parte più estrema, sottile o più alta di un oggetto o di una struttura.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il senso fisico di punta o estremità superiore, non altri usi figurati.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The narrow end or the highest end point of an object or structure.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the physical tip or upper end is modeled here, not broader abstract uses.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Das, was jemand oder etwas in Arbeit, Schule, Sport oder Technik erreicht oder zeigt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Gemeint ist die gezeigte Qualitaet oder das erreichte Niveau, nicht der Verwaltungs- oder Versicherungssinn von Leistungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Cio che una persona o un sistema riesce a fare o mostrare nel lavoro, nello studio, nello sport o sul piano tecnico.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui indica il rendimento o il livello mostrato, non il senso amministrativo di servizi o benefici.

concept_definitions.short_definition: What a person or system achieves or demonstrates in work, study, sport, or technical output.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers shown level or achieved output, not the administrative sense of services or benefits.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Ein feines, dekoratives Gewebe mit durchbrochenem Muster, das oft an Kleidung oder Stoffen verwendet wird.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Stoff- oder Textilsinn, nicht die Spitze eines Gegenstands und nicht die fuehrende Position.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Un tessuto decorativo leggero e traforato, usato spesso per vestiti o altri capi.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il senso tessile e decorativo, non altri significati della stessa parola tedesca.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A delicate decorative fabric with an open pattern, often used on clothes or textiles.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the textile or decorative-fabric sense is modeled here.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Die hoechste oder fuehrende Position in einer Rangordnung, Gruppe oder Entwicklung.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um die fuehrende oder oberste Stellung, nicht um die Spitze eines Gegenstands und nicht um Stoff.

concept_definitions.short_definition: La posizione piu alta o di guida in una classifica, in un gruppo o in una struttura.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui indica la posizione di testa o di comando, non un oggetto fisico appuntito.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The highest or leading position in a ranking, group, or structure.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers the leading or highest position sense only.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So formuliert oder gesagt, dass es scharf, verletzend oder unangenehm wirkt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die uebertragene Bedeutung fuer Bemerkungen, Kritik oder Tonfall, nicht die physische Form.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Detto di parole, osservazioni o tono che risultano duri, pungenti o facilmente offensivi.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il valore figurato riferito al modo di parlare o criticare.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Said of remarks or tone that sound sharp, biting, or hurtful.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the figurative remark or tone sense is modeled here, not the physical pointed-shape sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit jemandem gemeinsam einen Termin, eine Regel oder eine Bedingung festlegen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um das gemeinsame Festlegen oder Absprechen eines konkreten Punkts.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Stabilire insieme con qualcuno una data, una regola o una condizione concreta.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui indica l'accordarsi su un punto preciso, non una trattativa lunga o complessa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To settle or fix a date, rule, or condition together with someone.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers agreeing on a specific point, date, or condition.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Offiziell geltend oder so festgelegt, dass man sich daran halten muss.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von bindend oder verpflichtend, nicht die Bedeutung höflich oder zuvorkommend.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Ufficialmente valido o stabilito in modo tale da dover essere rispettato.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di obbligatorio o impegnativo sul piano formale.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Officially valid or fixed in a way that has to be respected.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the binding or obligatory sense is modeled here.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Ein Gespraech oder eine Reihe von Gespraechen, in denen Bedingungen, Preise oder Entscheidungen ausgehandelt werden.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von Verhandlung als Gespraech oder Negotiation, nicht Gerichtsverhandlung.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Una discussione o una serie di discussioni in cui si cercano di definire condizioni, prezzi o decisioni.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di negoziazione, non di udienza o processo.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A discussion or series of discussions in which conditions, prices, or decisions are worked out.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the negotiation or talks sense is modeled here, not the courtroom-trial sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit einer anderen Seite ueber Bedingungen, Interessen oder Entscheidungen sprechen, um zu einer Loesung zu kommen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur im Sinn von Bedingungen oder Interessen besprechen, nicht einen Fall vor Gericht behandeln.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Discutere con un'altra parte condizioni, interessi o decisioni per arrivare a un'intesa.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di trattare o discutere condizioni per trovare un accordo.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To discuss terms, interests, or decisions with another side in order to reach an agreement.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers discussing terms to reach an agreement.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Durch Verhandlungen schrittweise zu einem konkret festgelegten Ergebnis oder Detail kommen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier ist das Ergebnis staerker im Fokus als beim allgemeineren verhandeln.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Definire con trattative i dettagli concreti di un accordo fino a un risultato preciso.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui l'attenzione è sul definire negoziando un esito concreto, non sul discutere in generale.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To work out specific terms through negotiation until a concrete result is settled.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This is more outcome-focused than the broader verb to negotiate.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit Einsatz etwas schaffen, erreichen oder als Ergebnis hervorbringen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur im Sinn von etwas erreichen oder zustande bringen, nicht im Sinn von sich etwas leisten = bezahlen koennen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Riuscire a ottenere o portare a termine qualcosa con impegno e lavoro.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di ottenere o compiere qualcosa, non nel senso economico di potersi permettere qualcosa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To achieve, carry out, or produce something through effort.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the achieve or carry out sense is modeled here, not the afford sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas formell oder sachlich als Ergebnis, Nachweis, Leistung oder Beitrag liefern.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hauefig in formellen, beruflichen oder sachlichen Kontexten, zum Beispiel fuer Nachweise, Leistungen oder Beitraege.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Presentare o mettere a disposizione in modo formale un risultato, una prova, un servizio o un contributo.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui in senso formale e orientato al risultato, non come semplice dare quotidiano.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To formally deliver or make available a result, proof, service, or contribution.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers the formal result-oriented sense, not every everyday use of give or bring.

concept_definitions.short_definition: In der Lage, auch unter Belastung stark, effektiv und zuverlaessig zu arbeiten oder Ergebnisse zu erzielen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann sich auf Menschen, Teams, Systeme oder Geraete beziehen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Capace di lavorare o produrre risultati in modo forte, efficace e affidabile anche sotto carico.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a persone, team, sistemi o dispositivi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Able to work or produce results strongly, effectively, and reliably even under strain.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This can describe people, teams, systems, or devices.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Die Faehigkeit, unter Anforderungen oder Belastung gute und zuverlaessige Ergebnisse zu liefern.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann sich auf Menschen, Gruppen, Maschinen oder Systeme beziehen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: La capacità di fornire risultati buoni e affidabili anche in presenza di richieste o carico.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a persone, gruppi, macchine o sistemi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The ability to deliver good and reliable results even under requirements or strain.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This can refer to people, teams, machines, or systems.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Deutlich besser als andere oder weit ueber einem bereits hohen Standard liegend.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Stark wertend und hoeher als nur gut oder sehr gut.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Molto al di sopra degli altri o nettamente oltre un livello già alto.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Valutazione forte, più intensa di semplicemente buono o molto buono.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Clearly better than others or far above an already high standard.
concept_definitions.usage_note: A strong evaluative word, stronger than merely good or very good.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Als notwendige Bedingung verlangen oder als vorhanden benoetigen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von etwas als Bedingung verlangen, nicht annehmen oder stillschweigend erwarten.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Esigere come condizione necessaria o presupporre come gia presente per poter procedere.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di richiedere come prerequisito, non di supporre mentalmente qualcosa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To demand as a necessary condition or to need as already present.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the precondition sense is modeled here, not the sense of assuming something mentally.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Zur Folge haben oder so bewirken, dass etwas anderes notwendig wird.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier im eher formellen Sinn von etwas nach sich ziehen oder erforderlich machen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Avere come conseguenza qualcosa o rendere necessario un altro sviluppo.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso piu formale di implicare o rendere necessario.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To have something as a consequence or make another step necessary.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers the formal sense of entailing or making something necessary.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Inhaltlich oder ursachlich miteinander verbunden sein.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die abstrakte Verbindung zwischen Fakten, Ereignissen oder Ideen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Essere connesso a livello di contenuto, causa o significato.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso astratto di fatti, idee o sviluppi che sono legati tra loro.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To be linked in content, cause, or meaning.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the abstract relation between facts, ideas, or events is modeled here.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Gedanklich verstehen, wie etwas begruendet ist oder warum etwas so geschieht.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Sinn von Argumentation, Motivation oder Logik verstehen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Capire mentalmente il ragionamento, la logica o il motivo di qualcosa.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di riuscire a seguire un'argomentazione o una motivazione.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To understand the reasoning, logic, or motivation behind something.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the abstract reasoning sense is modeled here, not physical following.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So erklaert oder begruendet, dass man es gedanklich gut verstehen kann.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Entscheidungen, Argumente, Vorgehen oder Reaktionen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Spiegato o motivato in modo tale da poter essere capito bene.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per decisioni, argomenti, procedure o reazioni.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Clear and logical
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for decisions, arguments, procedures, or reactions.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Von jemandem oder etwas viel Einsatz, Faehigkeit oder eine starke Reaktion verlangen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier im Sinn von fordern oder stark beanspruchen, nicht im engen Sinn einer formellen Herausforderung zum Duell.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Richiedere molto impegno, capacità o una forte reazione a qualcuno o qualcosa.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso ampio di mettere alla prova, non solo di lanciare una sfida formale.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To demand a lot of effort, ability, or response from someone or something.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers the broader sense of testing or demanding a lot, not only a formal challenge.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Schwierig und anspruchsvoll, sodass echter Einsatz noetig ist.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann fuer Aufgaben, Situationen, Phasen oder Ziele verwendet werden.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Difficile e richiedente, tanto da domandare un vero impegno.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Puo riferirsi a compiti, situazioni, periodi o obiettivi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Difficult and demanding in a way that requires real effort.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This can describe tasks, situations, phases, or goals.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Eine Situation, in der Menschen etwas unterschiedlich verstehen und dadurch ein falsches Bild entsteht.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch bei unklarer Formulierung, fehlendem Kontext oder unterschiedlichen Erwartungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Una situazione in cui persone diverse capiscono la stessa cosa in modi differenti e nasce un'idea sbagliata.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico quando mancano contesto o chiarezza.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A situation in which people understand something differently and a wrong impression results.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical when wording is unclear, context is missing, or expectations differ.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas falsch verstehen oder einer Aussage, Person oder Situation einen unzutreffenden Sinn geben.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um inhaltliches Fehlverstehen, nicht um blosses Ueberhoeren.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Capire in modo sbagliato il senso di una frase, di un'intenzione o di una situazione.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di interpretare male, non semplicemente di non sentire bene.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To understand the meaning of a message, intention, or situation incorrectly.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers interpreting something wrongly, not merely failing to hear it.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Bei jemandem durch Qualitaet, Faehigkeit, Auftreten oder Leistung einen starken positiven Eindruck hinterlassen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um einen spuerbaren positiven Eindruck, nicht um blosses Gefallen oder Zustimmung.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Lasciare una forte impressione positiva grazie a qualità, capacità, presenza o risultati.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo nel senso di fare impressione in positivo, non nel senso fisico di colpire.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To leave a strong positive impression through quality, ability, presence, or results.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers making a noticeable positive impression, not simply being liked.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas so erklaeren oder formulieren, dass kein Missverstaendnis mehr bleibt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um ausdrueckliches Klarwerdenlassen einer Aussage, Position oder Situation.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Spiegare o formulare qualcosa in modo tale da non lasciare più spazio a fraintendimenti.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di rendere esplicita una posizione, una frase o una situazione.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To explain or formulate something so that no misunderstanding remains.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers making a statement, position, or situation explicit and clear.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So klar, dass nur eine Interpretation oder Schlussfolgerung moeglich ist.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Aussagen, Belege, Ergebnisse oder Signale.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Così chiaro da permettere una sola interpretazione o conclusione.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per dichiarazioni, prove, risultati o segnali.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So clear that only one interpretation or conclusion is possible.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for statements, evidence, results, or signals.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So formuliert oder dargestellt, dass man es leicht falsch verstehen kann.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Saetze, Nachrichten, Hinweise oder Reaktionen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Formulato o presentato in modo tale da poter essere facilmente capito male.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per frasi, messaggi, avvisi o reazioni.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Phrased or presented in a way that can easily be understood wrongly.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for sentences, messages, notices, or reactions.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas auf Grundlage von Erfahrung, Informationen oder Beobachtung beurteilen oder abschaetzen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um ein urteilendes Einschaetzen, nicht um exaktes Messen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Giudicare o stimare qualcosa sulla base di esperienza, informazioni o osservazione.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso di farsi una valutazione ragionata, non di misurare con precisione.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To judge or estimate something on the basis of experience, information, or observation.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers reasoned assessment, not exact measurement.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Ein Urteil oder eine Beurteilung, die auf Erfahrung, Information oder Beobachtung beruht.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Lageeinschaetzungen, Risikoabschaetzungen oder persoenliche Beurteilungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Un giudizio o una stima fondati su esperienza, informazioni o osservazione.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per valutazioni della situazione, dei rischi o di un contesto.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A judgment or estimate based on experience, information, or observation.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for situation assessments, risk assessments, or considered judgments.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So stark begruendet oder praesentiert, dass es andere glaubhaft mitnimmt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Argumente, Auftritte, Belege oder Konzepte.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Presentato o motivato in modo tale da risultare credibile e persuasivo.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per argomenti, prove, presentazioni o proposte.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Presented or reasoned in a way that seems credible and persuasive.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for arguments, evidence, proposals, or presentations.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So handelnd, dass Folgen ernst genommen werden und sorgfaeltig mit einer Aufgabe oder Rolle umgegangen wird.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um die Art zu handeln, nicht nur darum, fuer etwas offiziell zustaendig zu sein.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Che agisce tenendo seriamente conto delle conseguenze e trattando con cura un compito o un ruolo.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui nel senso del modo di agire, non solo dell'essere formalmente incaricato.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Acting in a way that takes consequences seriously and treats a role or task with care.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers responsible conduct, not only formal responsibility or being in charge.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So, dass man sich darauf verlassen kann, weil es konstant gut funktioniert oder geschieht.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann fuer Menschen, Informationen, Systeme oder Prozesse gelten.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Tale da potervi fare affidamento, perché funziona o agisce bene in modo costante.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Può riferirsi a persone, informazioni, sistemi o processi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Dependable because it works or acts well in a steady and consistent way.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This can apply to people, information, systems, or processes.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas in einen groesseren Zusammenhang oder in eine passende Kategorie setzen, damit es besser verstanden werden kann.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier vor allem fuer Informationen, Ereignisse, Aussagen oder Entwicklungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Collocare qualcosa in un contesto più ampio o in una categoria adatta per capirlo meglio.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui soprattutto per informazioni, eventi, affermazioni o sviluppi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To place something in a broader context or suitable category so that it can be understood better.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This is used especially for information, events, statements, or developments.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Die gedankliche Einbettung oder Kategorisierung von etwas, damit es besser verstanden werden kann.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Erklaerungen, Analysen oder Kommentare, die Fakten in einen Zusammenhang setzen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: L'inserimento o la classificazione ragionata di qualcosa in un contesto più ampio per capirlo meglio.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per spiegazioni, analisi o commenti che danno prospettiva ai fatti.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The act or result of placing something in a broader context so that it can be understood better.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for explanations, analyses, or commentary that put facts into perspective.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So unheimlich oder schaurig, dass es ein unangenehmes Angstgefuehl ausloest.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch fuer Orte, Geschichten, Geraeusche oder Situationen mit duesterer Atmosphaere.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Che mette a disagio o fa provare una paura sottile e strana.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per luoghi, storie, rumori o situazioni con un'atmosfera cupa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Strange and unsettling in a way that makes you feel slightly frightened.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for places, stories, sounds, or situations with a dark atmosphere.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Der freie Raum oder die ausreichende Distanz zwischen Personen oder Dingen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es eher um Zwischenraum oder Sicherheitsabstand als um die Strecke zwischen zwei Orten; dafür steht eher Entfernung.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Lo spazio o margine da lasciare tra persone o cose.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui soprattutto nel senso di spazio o distanza di sicurezza, non della lunghezza di un percorso.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The space or safe distance between people or things.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This focuses on gap or clearance, not the general distance between places.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas, worin zwei oder mehr Dinge nicht gleich sind.
Cio in cui due o piu cose non sono uguali.
The way in which two or more things are not the same.
Kräftig, stabil und nicht leicht zu beschädigen oder aus dem Gleichgewicht zu bringen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann Menschen, Materialien, Geräte oder Systeme beschreiben; hier nicht im militärischen Sinn.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Forte, solido e non facile da danneggiare o far cedere.
